title: OfOne Operating Walkthrough
purpose: Explain how OfOne turns bounded inquiry into validated, patchable decision state.

frames.title: Objective Enters
frames.visual_focus: A raw objective collapses into a bounded charter card.
frames.narration: OfOne starts with a bounded objective. The question is not answered yet. It is chartered.
frames.transition: raw text becomes a charter node

frames.title: Geometry Kernel
frames.visual_focus: Scene, frame, token, move, edge, loop, invariant, and gate appear as primitives.
frames.narration: The system uses geometry first. Scenes, frames, tokens, moves, edges, loops, invariants, and gates become the base layer.

frames.title: Adapter Projection
frames.visual_focus: Domain labels flow into the geometry through adapter lenses.
frames.narration: Adapters project domain language onto the geometry. Strategy, science, proof search, and policy keep their semantics without breaking the common shape.

frames.title: Evidence Ledger
frames.visual_focus: Source cards become evidence objects with hashes, excerpts, permissions, and risks.
frames.narration: Evidence is not a claim. Sources are logged with identity, provenance, excerpts, recency, permission, and risks.

frames.title: Claim Graph
frames.visual_focus: Atomic claims link to support, contradiction, dependencies, and confidence basis.
frames.narration: Claims are atomized and connected. Each claim must show what supports it, what contradicts it, and what would break it.

frames.title: Loops And Gates
frames.visual_focus: Feedback loops and human review gates attach to risky paths.
frames.narration: Real systems change through loops. OfOne names feedback, incentives, measurement, review, deception, and regime shifts, then blocks unsafe movement with gates.

frames.title: Validator
frames.visual_focus: A compiler pass flags malformed edges, unsupported claims, missing gates, and benchmark violations.
frames.narration: Before release, the map is validated. Schema checks run first. Semantic checks follow. A broken map cannot pretend to be a final decision.

frames.title: Rendering
frames.visual_focus: The validated graph compresses into Executive, Analyst, Audit, or Patch Impact views.
frames.narration: The answer is a rendering of the state. The user sees the decision, confidence, why, blocking unknowns, gates, and update triggers.

frames.title: Patch Closure
frames.visual_focus: New evidence activates a dependency closure path through claims, edges, loops, options, gates, and rendering.
frames.narration: When evidence changes, OfOne does not rewrite blindly. It follows dependency closure and patches the affected state.

frames.title: Benchmark Boundary
frames.visual_focus: Validated artifacts enter a benchmark matrix while superiority claims remain blocked.
frames.narration: The system can be useful before it is proven superior. Superiority claims wait for controlled benchmark evidence.

rendering_notes.visual_style: Dense but calm decision-tool interface. Use geometric flow, not decorative abstraction.
rendering_notes.accessibility: Keep text short, high contrast, and non-overlapping across 16:9 and mobile preview crops.
